title: Quadratic SIGHASH Hashing Cost
description: Legacy signature hashing repeated transaction-wide work for each input, creating quadratic validation cost as transactions grew. Cached digest designs such as BIP 143 address this performance failure while preserving signature-commitment semantics.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Project: Quadratic Sighash problem explained
resources.notes: Learner-facing explanation of the historical O(n^2) hashing problem.

resources.title: BIP 143: Transaction Signature Verification
resources.notes: Defines the digest structure and cached components that avoid repeated hashing work.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background on transaction digests and signature verification.
